Transcrição Completa: 8 I Have to Get my Lawyer to Review Before Moving Forward
[00:00] Okay, next objection. I have to get my lawyer to review this before I can move forward.
[00:06] I want to be clear. I don't really view this as an objection. I view this as you're just not going to get the deal on that call and you need to schedule a follow-up time when you're actually going to move forward.
[00:17] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO
─────────────────────────────
TEXTO: "Follow-up Scheduling Strategy"
NÚMEROS: Couple of days vs months timeline
VISUAL: Calendário mostrando diferentes tempos de revisão legal, comparação entre advogados rápidos vs lentos, timeline de follow-up
[00:19] So, we'd want to reiterate to the person when we're going to get that follow-up conversation scheduled.
[00:25] So, as an example, just to roleplay it, hey, I have to get my lawyer to review this before I can move forward.
[00:32] Sounds fair to me. Interestingly enough, a lot of people who do that, um, they'll get back to us within a couple days and usually they'll pull the trigger.
[00:41] Other people, I don't know what kind of lawyers they have, but they take months.
[00:46] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO
─────────────────────────────
TEXTO: "Incentive Timeline Pressure"
NÚMEROS: Time frame specific incentives mentioned
VISUAL: Relógio com incentivos desaparecendo ao longo do tempo, comparação visual entre deal "doce" vs deal padrão
[00:47] And I just want to reiterate to you, if you do the deal in this time frame, we give you these incentives.
[00:53] If it takes longer than that, then those incentives are stripped away, and the deal just, you know, it's not as sweet as it could be if you move fast.
[01:02] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO
─────────────────────────────
TEXTO: "Lawyer Speed Assessment"
NÚMEROS: Later this week follow-up timing
VISUAL: Tartaruga representando advogado lento vs coelho representando advogado rápido, humor visual sobre velocidade de revisão
[01:04] Do you think it's fair if we schedule a follow-up time later this week to talk with one another if your lawyer's going to review it in that time frame?
[01:12] Or is your lawyer one of those slow ones that's going to move like a turtle?
